title: calamus politus
intro: Calamus politus is a type of rhizome of the plant Acorus calamus, commonly known as sweet flag or calamus. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of calamus politus include relieving digestive issues, such as nausea and indigestion, as well as reducing stress and anxiety. Calamus politus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
